text.title: agents-react-pattern Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for agents-react-pattern as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Providing a tool list in the system prompt without explicit iteration and same-argument limits.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without the same-argument guard, models hallucinate "it will work next time" and call the same broken tool indefinitely. The explicit limit in the prompt reinforces the hard limit in code.
